name: antigravity-native-e2e-dev
description: Spin up a live local Omnigent server + runner and exercise the native Antigravity (agy) TUI harness (antigravity-native) end-to-end — launch the real `agy` CLI via `omnigent antigravity`, drive turns through the web UI, smoke-test, and bug-bash. Load when developing, testing, or debugging the antigravity-native harness (omnigent/inner/antigravity_native_executor.py, omnigent/antigravity_native.py, antigravity_native_bridge.py, antigravity_native_rpc.py, antigravity_native_reader.py, antigravity_
author: omnigent-ai
